title: SOLID, Code Smells, and Evidence-Driven Refactoring
description: Evolve a growing circulation system without changing its verified external behavior. Learners cumulatively produce a complete first version of a refactored maintainable service while every earlier competency remains active through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Use design principles as diagnostic questions rather than rigid rules.
Identify change friction, coupling, duplication, and leaky abstraction from evidence.
Refactor in small behavior-preserving steps with tests and measurements.
